PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?person ?personLabel(YEAR(?birthDate) AS ?birthYear) WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?person p:P106 ?occupationStatement .
  ?occupationStatement ps:P106 wd:Q13474373 .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?occupationStatement pq:P582 []
  }
  .
  ?person wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?person wdt:P570 []
  }
  .
  FILTER(datatype(?birthDate) = xsd:dateTime && YEAR(?birthDate) > 1920)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person rdfs:label ?personLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?personLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY ASC(?birthDate)
LIMIT 1
